position: Person in Charge (PIC) of Electronics - KRAI Division
description: Responsible for the design, development, integration, and maintenance of electronic systems for the KRAI (Kontes Robot ABU Indonesia) team. Managing electronic components, sensor systems, power distribution, PCB development, hardware troubleshooting, and ensuring the reliability of robot electronics during testing and competitions.

Participating in a student community that brings together students from POLINES, UNDIP, and Poltekkes Semarang. Involved in social activities, networking programs, and community development initiatives while building strong connections and collaboration among students from Pati.
Operating DMX lighting systems for various live events, and public events. Responsible for lighting setup, programming, operation, and troubleshooting during productions.

Responsible for serving customers, taking orders, delivering food and beverages, and maintaining service quality. Gained valuable experience in communication, teamwork, time management, and customer satisfaction.
